title: Faulty sewage line installed by BWSSB causing sewage overflow in residential area
description:
We would like to bring to your notice that in December 2019 BWSSB had laid new sewage line through Maruthi Layout second cross and connected larger areas of Chinnappanahalli kundalahalli and AECS layout to the sewage line. After the new sewage line is laid whenever it rains sewage water and sewage slug backflows onto Maruthi Layout second cross drains and road through manholes posing grave risk to the health of the residents.
this is due to blocked sewage line near Ragam bakery causing sewage backflow in upstream area including maruthi layout 2nd cross and empty line in downstream area. we have made multiple complaints on this topics to BWSSB AE of the BEML layout Brookefield area. However they have failed to resolve this issue till date since last 2 years.
This causing
1) Health and safety hazard to residents of this area due to sewage water constantly on the roads and storm water drains
2) increased cases of dengue chikungunia and COvid19 infections
3) foundation weakening of building in this area due to constant sewage water on the layout due to blocked draings.
Please help us addressing this issue on priority.
We are attaching photographs of sewage water accumulation on the road and in front of houses during rains. Slug accumulation can be seen in the drains even now with manholes full of sewage causing backflow.
location: #137, Cmrs Siddhartha Enclave, House No 44, Maruthi Layout, 1St Cross Rd, Next To Royal English School, Chennappa Layout, Chinnapanna Halli, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560037, India

title: 300mts strech from the main road the road is in very bad shape
description:
We are residing at Sumadhura Sandoval and adj to our apartment is Geethanjali apartment. The approach road from the main road (landmark 200mts from Kundanahalli junction, known as varthur main road) about 300mts is in a very bad shape. Vibgyor school , Narayana school buses take children every day on this pathetic road and it might cause injuries to the kids due to the road condition.  Other apartments in the vicinity too travel on this bumpy road. Close to 600-800 (private cars+Taxi's) also ply on this road day in and day out as this is only the approach road to get to other apartments. This road is in this state for quite few years and our request was put across to multiple govt agencies that had gone to deaf years till date. Road is in very dangerous state and causing injuries especially during Rainy season as none are aware how deep the poth holes. With this email initiative would request the BBMP/Concerned authorities to take necessary steps in laying the 300mtr stretch road which would help the public while commuting on the road. 

I would request concerned  authorities
location: Varthur Rd, Vibgyor High School Rd, Kumarapalli, Gandhi Nagar, Whitefield, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560066, India

title: Road is blocked since 3 weeks
description:
It's been 3 weeks this road is blocked. Many people who travel via this road taking u turn and traveling 3 km extra to reach doddanekundi ORR. Under railway bridge it always gets blocked with rain water whenever little heavy rain comes. Other way is so horrible to cross track.
In the attached pic you can see people crossing the road by walking above railway track. Daily thousands of people travel this way. They use this way as an alternative way whenever water is clogged under bridge. From yesterday onwards this way also blocked by some local guys with a stone fence.
 I have sent all ages people like many young men and women employees, mainly elderly people and kids, Mothers carrying kids, daily workers etc. crossing this worst way daily. But today I have seen all these people climbing and jumping on the stone fence. It's very sad to see women, old people and kids taking such risks daily. And the way is too slippery once someone slips then they directly fall into the flood water under the bridge. Please take this complaint seriously and help us people who stays in Doddanekundi. Thanks.
